productDisplayName: Fastrack Women Steel Body Steel Watches
description: Stylish and comfortable, this analogue wrist watch from fastrack is designed for those who love their everyday accessories. Hit the road in style with this designer dial and don that rock star look.Case diameter:  18 mmCase thickness: 5 mmDial shape: RectangleMetallic case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfortMetallic strap with butterfly clasp for comfort and styleWhite dial with brand name marking on the bottom right corner and brand logo on the top right cornerQuartz movement of time display with carved out handsScrew to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant up to 30 meters allowing you to use it when washing hands or in mild rain
